calendar.matters:
STATUS CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-12-2002 Off Calendar

STATUS CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-25-2002 Continued To Jun-21-02 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MOTION To Strike Complaint
Off Calendar May-02-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Clifford E. Yin, Esq., COBLENTZ, PATCH, DUFFY & BASS, appeared on behalf of defendant and moving party MCI Worldcom.

There being no appearances, the Court adopted its tentative ruling as the order of the Court: Defendant MCI Worldcom's motion to strike complaint is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. (JJM/KH) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR # 7855

Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel-Civil
Off Calendar Feb-28-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
N O A P P E A R A N C E on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- GOODIN, MacBRIDE, SQUERI, RITCHIE & DAY's motion to be relieved as counsel for the Plaintiff is granted - no opposition. Order effective upon filing of proof of service of Order on client. (JJM/af) Eric Throne, CSR 7855
